testcase.name: test_export_returns_address_and_pk

failure.message: AssertionError: Bad PK fmt: daf45364cd... assert None + where None = <built-in method match of re.Pattern object at 0xff4a9f0413f0>('daf45364cdc14d758ba368be09e8a392d175830f3345fff6c96fca658a645ba8') + where <built-in method match of re.Pattern object at 0xff4a9f0413f0> = re.compile('^0x[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$').match

skipped.message: smoke account is not pro; pinning ordering not testable without DB write
